arts.ttl: How Man Utd managers fared in their first Premier League games
arts.sum: As Ruben Amorim prepares for his first match in charge, we look back at the Premier League debuts for all Man Utd's permanent managers since Sir Alex Ferguson retired.

arts.ttl: Was new Man Utd boss Amorim always destined for success?
arts.sum: BBC Sport speaks to some of those closest to Ruben Amorim to delve into his character and discover what the new Manchester United boss will bring to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim theory emerges after Man United comments as brutal Erik ten Hag jibe sent
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has attracted praise for his first press conference as Manchester United head coach and ex-striker Michael Owen is among them.

arts.ttl: Man United guaranteed to be without seven stars vs Ipswich as Ruben Amorim blow confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United injury news with Ruben Amorim set to be without a host of key players as he gets to work against Ipswich Town

arts.ttl: Tottenham enter race for bargain Man United target who left Old Trafford in 2020
arts.sum: Tottenham have entered the race for Lille’s Angel Gomes and are expected to challenge Man United for his signature ahead of the midfielder becoming a free agent at the end of the season. The 24-year-old has been with the Ligue 1 club since 2020 having departed the Manchester club as the opportunity to play regularly […] The post Tottenham enter race for bargain Man United target who left Old Trafford in 2020 appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: How Ruben Amorim has 'impressed' Man Utd players in first week on the job
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is already making a positive impact.

arts.ttl: Team News: Ipswich Town vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Ipswich Town and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: 'Nkunku's Man Utd threat HEALTHY for Chelsea'
arts.sum: And though the former PSG and RB Leipzig attacker has been in good form, he has barely been given Premier League minutes and would like to join Manchester United in the January transfer window. “If the biggest problem Chelsea have is a couple of player being unhappy and not getting enough game time, then you know the club’s in a healthy position,” Joe Cole told TNT Sports .

arts.ttl: ‘I love that kid’ - Ruben Amorim reveals which Man United star has made ‘important’ first impression
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has not had much time to work with his Manchester United players but says one player in particular has left him excited.

arts.ttl: 'Dreamer' Amorim 'right guy' to revive Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim says he is the "right guy at the right time" to turn Manchester United around.
